mapper.content:
Hi {{8.CoordinatorName}},

The CAS Monitor scenario did not run because one or more preflight checks failed.

Issues found:
    {{51.PreFlightErrors}}
What this means:
No emails were sent to students or advisors. The scenario stopped before processing any student data.

What to do:
Fix the issues above, then run the scenario manually from Make.com to verify everything works. The next scheduled run will resume normally.

File status:
  • Settings file: {{if(42.SettingsFileCount = 1 & 42.SettingsFileTrashed = "false"; "OK"; "PROBLEM")}}
  • {{8.DisplayNameDP1}}: {{if(50.Y11FileCount = 1 & 50.Y11Trashed = "false"; "OK (last modified " + formatDate(parseDate(50.Y11Modified; "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss"); "DD MMM YYYY") + ")"; "PROBLEM")}}
  • {{8.DisplayNameDP2}}: {{if(50.Y12FileCount = 1 & 50.Y12Trashed = "false"; "OK (last modified " + formatDate(parseDate(50.Y12Modified; "YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss"); "DD MMM YYYY") + ")"; "PROBLEM")}}
- CAS Checking Bot (Make.com)

mapper.content:
Hi {{8.CoordinatorName}},

The CAS monitoring scenario was unable to process {{11.DisplayName}} because the CAS export file does not appear to be correctly formatted.

Error detail:
Expected 'Student ID' in cell A1 of Summary tab, but found '{{12.`0`}}'. The ManageBac header rows (rows 1-4) may not have been removed.

How to fix this:
  1. Open the {{11.DisplayName}} CAS export file in Google Sheets
  2. Check that all 3 tabs have the ManageBac header rows removed
  3. Row 1 of each tab should be the column headers
  4. If you see rows like 'CAS Excel Export', school name, or class info at the top, delete those rows

No student emails were sent for {{11.DisplayName}}.

- CAS Make Automation Bot
mapper.subject: CAS Scenario Error: {{11.DisplayName}} Export Not Correctly Formatted

mapper.content:
Hi {{8.CoordinatorName}},

The {{11.DisplayName}} export file at {{8.SchoolName}} only contains {{length(16.array)}} student rows.

The minimum threshold is set to {{if(11.CurrentLevel = "Y11"; 8.MinStudentsY11; 8.MinStudentsY12)}} in your Settings file. The scenario stopped processing {{11.DisplayName}} because the row count looks suspicious.

Possible causes:
  • The export was uploaded but the data was empty or only contained header rows
  • You forgot to delete rows 1-4 (ManageBac headers) after importing
  • You uploaded a different level's export by mistake
  • Your class genuinely has this many students (in which case lower the Min Students setting)
To fix: check your {{11.DisplayName}} export file, then re-run the scenario manually.

- CAS Checking Bot (Make.com)
mapper.subject: CAS Monitor: Suspicious row count for {{11.DisplayName}}

mapper.subject: Action Required: ManageBac CAS Portfolio Update
mapper.content:
{{if(11.SendStudentEmails = "TRUE"; "Hi " + 17.`3` + 17.`2` + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " さん"; "") + ",

Your ManageBac CAS portfolio requires your attention:" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
あなたのManageBac CASポートフォリオについて、以下の確認が必要です："; "") + "
"; "Dear " + 17.`6` + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " 先生"; "") + ",

This is a report on " + 17.`3` + "'s ManageBac CAS Portfolio." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
これは " + 17.`2` + " さんのManageBac CASポートフォリオに関するレポートです。"; "") + "
")}}
    {{if(22.CountUnapproved > 0; "
  1. Unapproved Activities" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (承認待ちのアクティビティ)"; "") + ":
      " + 22.UnapprovedText + "
    Please ask your CAS Advisor to approve the activity so you can begin." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    活動を開始できるように、CASアドバイザーに承認を依頼してください。"; "") + "

    2. "; emptystring)}}{{if(22.CountNoSupervisor > 0; "
  2. Missing Supervisor Name" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (スーパーバイザー名が未記入)"; "") + ":
      " + 22.NoSupervisorText + "
    Please add a supervisor name to each of these experiences in ManageBac." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    ManageBac上で、これらの活動にスーパーバイザー名を追加してください。"; "") + "

    3. "; emptystring)}}{{if(22.ReflectionsRatio <= 11.MinEvidence; "
  3. Low Evidence/Reflections" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (エビデンス・リフレクションの不足)"; "") + ":
    Your average is " + 22.ReflectionsRatio + " per experience. The minimum ratio expected is " + 11.MinEvidence + "." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    1つの活動あたりの平均は " + 22.ReflectionsRatio + " です。期待される最小基準は " + 11.MinEvidence + " です。"; "") + "
    Please add reflections and evidence to your experiences in Managebac." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    ManageBacで活動にリフレクションとエビデンスを追加してください。"; "") + "

    4. "; emptystring)}}{{if(length(33.GapText) > 0; "
  4. Timeline Gaps" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (活動期間の空白)"; "") + ":
      " + 33.GapText + "
    Please ensure you have regular participation to avoid large gaps in your portfolio." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    ポートフォリオに大きな空白期間ができないよう、継続的に活動を行ってください。"; "") + "

    5. "; emptystring)}}{{if(length(33.UnreviewedText) > 0; "
  5. Unreviewed Activities" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (未レビューのアクティビティ)"; "") + ":
      " + 33.UnreviewedText + "
    Please upload your missing evidence/reflections and request a supervisor review." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    不足しているエビデンス・リフレクションをアップロードし、スーパーバイザーにレビューを依頼してください。"; "") + "

    6. "; emptystring)}}{{if(22.HasProject = "No" & 11.CheckProject = "TRUE"; "
  6. Missing CAS Project" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (CASプロジェクトが未設定)"; "") + ":
    You have not yet designated a project." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    まだプロジェクトが指定されていません。"; "") + "
    Please submit your CAS approval form to the CAS Coordinator." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    CASコーディネーターに承認フォームを提出してください。"; "") + "

    7. "; emptystring)}}{{if(17.`9` - 22.ExpectedOutcomes < 0; "
  7. Learning Outcomes Behind Schedule" + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (学習目標の遅れ)"; "") + ":
    You have completed " + 17.`9` + " of " + 8.TotalOutcomes + " Learning Outcomes. Based on your timeline, you should have at least " + 22.ExpectedOutcomes + " by now." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    現在 " + 8.TotalOutcomes + " つの学習目標のうち " + 17.`9` + " つを完了しています。スケジュールに基づくと、現時点で少なくとも " + 22.ExpectedOutcomes + " つ完了している必要があります。"; "") + "

    Please work with your CAS Advisor, " + 17.`6` + " to address the remaining outcomes." + if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; "
    残りの目標について、CASアドバイザーの " + 17.`6` + " 先生と相談してください。"; "") + "

    8. "; emptystring)}}
Thank you{{if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (よろしくお願いいたします)"; "")}},

{{8.CoordinatorName}}
CAS Coordinator{{if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " (CASコーディネーター)"; "")}}
(This is an automated reminder based on current ManageBac export data. If you spot a discrepancy or have already updated your portfolio, please inform me.{{if(11.BilingualJapanese = "TRUE"; " / これは現在のManageBacのデータに基づく自動配信メールです。相違がある場合や、すでにポートフォリオを更新済みの場合はお知らせください。"; "")}})

mapper.content:
Hi {{8.CoordinatorName}},

The CAS audit for {{11.DisplayName}} at {{8.SchoolName}} is complete ({{formatDate(now; "DD MMM YYYY")}}).

Issues found:
{{36.text}}
Student Name Unapproved No Supervisor Reflections Ratio Timeline Gaps Unreviewed CAS Project Outcomes

Columns showing '-' indicate that check is disabled in settings.

{{if(11.SendStudentEmails = "TRUE"; if(11.SendAdvisorEmails = "TRUE"; "Emails: FULLY ENABLED — warning emails were sent to students with issues and copied to CAS advisors."; "Emails: STUDENT ONLY — warning emails were sent to students with issues (Advisors not copied.)"); if(11.SendAdvisorEmails = "TRUE"; "Emails: ADVISOR ONLY — student's CAS reports were sent to CAS Advisors (Students not emailed.)"; "Emails: DISABLED (testing mode) — no emails were sent to students or advisors."))}}

- CAS Checking Bot (Make.com)
